articles.title: OPENAI LAUNCHES NEW ‘CANVAS' CHATGPT INTERFACE TAILORED TO WRITING AND CODING PROJECTS
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced "canvas," a new interface for ChatGPT that provides a separate workspace for writing and coding projects. This editable workspace allows users to generate content directly, modify specific sections, and improve AI-generated outputs without redoing entire prompts. Rolling out first to ChatGPT Plus and Teams users, canvas is part of OpenAI's efforts to enhance competitive offerings against similar features from Anthropic's Artifacts and Cursor.

articles.title: APPLE CONTINUES WORK ON ALL-GLASS MACBOOK WITH VIRTUAL KEYBOARD AND TRACKPAD
articles.summary: Apple is developing an all-glass MacBook with a virtual keyboard and trackpad that will use haptic feedback and electrostatic charges to simulate physical keys. A continuation patent published in 2024 confirms the project is still active, though it's uncertain if the virtual keyboard will fully replicate the feel of real typing.

articles.title: TECHCRUNCH REIMAGINED: WELCOME TO OUR NEW DESIGN
articles.summary: The redesigned TechCrunch site features improved navigation, a modern aesthetic, and real-time updates on breaking stories. The new interface enhances user experience while retaining top-tier reporting and analysis. A dedicated team led the effort, with support from Yahoo, TechCrunch's parent company.

articles.title: MICROSOFT PAINT, ONCE A JOKE, COULD BE THE FUTURE OF IMAGE EDITING
articles.summary: Microsoft Paint's latest update includes AI tools like Generative Fill and Erase, allowing free, easy image modifications on Windows 11. With features such as an 8x resolution upscaler, Paint could challenge Adobe Photoshop. Other tech companies like Meta and Google are also expanding their AI-powered image editing options.

articles.title: INTERVIEW WITH BJÖRN OTTOSSON, CREATOR OF THE OKLAB COLOR SPACE
articles.summary: Oklab is a perceptual color space designed to better align with human color perception. This interview with Björn Ottosson, the Swedish engineer who created Oklab, explores how it addresses limitations in traditional color spaces like sRGB and Lab and how it gained widespread adoption in browsers and tools such as Photoshop and CSS.

articles.title: SCALING PLATFORMS THROUGH USE CASES
articles.summary: New technology companies often aim to be platforms for broad areas like AI or the Internet of Things. However, a broad vision without a clear strategy can hinder decision-making. Success comes from addressing specific use cases first, for example, Yelp focused on restaurant reviews before scaling to other services.

articles.title: CSS SPRING EASING GENERATOR
articles.summary: This tool lets you intuitively generate spring animations for CSS linear(). It includes presets and customizable inputs for perceptual duration and bounce.

articles.title: DEV ENCYCLOPEDIA
articles.summary: Discover concise explanations and samples for tech terms and concepts.

articles.title: FRAMER PLUGIN MARKETPLACE
articles.summary: Discover new canvas tools and seamlessly integrate Framer with your favorite apps.

articles.title: CHISEL & FLOW: GT PANTHEON IS A NEW CLASSIC
articles.summary: GT Pantheon, a new typeface from Grilli Type designed by Noël Leu, Tobias Rechsteiner, and Antonio D'Elisiis, features pointed serifs and sharp digital anatomy. It is available in 30 styles across five weights and italics. With optically adjusted faces for micro, text, and display use, it offers a contemporary calligraphic design inspired by Rome's Pantheon, supporting legibility at any size. A free trial version is available.

articles.title: PENTAGRAM UNVEILS ITS IDENTITY FOR MANCHESTER'S NEW INNOVATION DISTRICT, SISTER
articles.summary: Pentagram has designed a new visual identity for Sister, an innovation district in Manchester, inspired by the city's history in computer science and Alan Turing's legacy. The brand features Sister Mono, a custom typeface based on early code-breaking machines, and a logotype inspired by The Manchester Code to symbolize connectivity and movement.

articles.title: THE IMPORTANT ROLE OF DESIGN SYSTEMS IN MODERN UI
articles.summary: A design system standardizes tools and resources, creating consistent and efficient UI and UX. It helps teams develop a shared language, optimize resources, and proactively address UI challenges. Design systems streamline testing and ensure long-term consistency, allowing companies to create user-friendly, innovative digital experiences across all products.

articles.title: HOW TO CONDUCT COGNITIVE WALKTHROUGHS TO IMPROVE YOUR SITE'S UX
articles.summary: Cognitive walkthroughs help evaluate website usability by simulating a new user's experience and highlighting issues that hinder navigation and understanding, guiding design improvements.

articles.title: AI-DRIVEN FILMMAKING: HOW RUNWAY IS TRANSFORMING VISUAL STORYTELLING AND CREATIVITY WITH GEN-3 ALPHA
articles.summary: Runway's Gen-3 Alpha model enables AI-driven filmmaking, transforming video styles and enhancing effects for innovative storytelling.

articles.title: DESIGN WHAT MAKES US HUMAN
articles.summary: UX design can evoke emotions beyond enjoyment, and as AI grows, more emotionally engaging, culturally aware designs may be needed.
